user.title: Set up Home Assistant Email Bridge
user.description: Create a local webhook receiver for fake email notifications. Recipient names map to Home Assistant notify services.

error.invalid_recipients: Recipients must be valid JSON. Each recipient needs a notify_service such as notify.mobile_app_dads_iphone or persistent_notification.create.

abort.already_configured: Home Assistant Email Bridge is already configured.

init.title: Home Assistant Email Bridge options
init.description: Update recipient mappings. The fake email local part, such as dad in dad@ha-notify.local, is matched to these keys.

error.invalid_recipients: Recipients must be valid JSON. Each recipient needs a notify_service such as notify.mobile_app_dads_iphone or persistent_notification.create.
